description: Relax and feel comfortable in the finest sandals by red tape. Pair them with your favorite casual trousers, shorts or jeans and set your own fashion statement! Upper Leather straps covering the forefoot and midfoot for durability and style A leather loop on the upper middle holding the straps in place Padded ankle strap in leather to lock the foot in place with a velcro closure All straps have a fabric inner lining and are padded to protect the feet from blistering and to offer breathable comfort Padded footbed with print Upper stitched to the outsole for durability Outsole Durable rubber outsole, curved at the midfoot to offer absolute ergonomic comfort Textured outsole with multi-directional lugs for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces Sandal care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
